modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: DYMO LabelWriter 550 Turbo not printing labels on Windows 11

full_description_text:  
The user was trying to print labels. They have a DYMO LabelWriter 550 Turbo. It’s connected to Windows 11 and using DYMO Connect. But it just won’t print anything at all. They seemed frustrated and kept asking why it’s not working.
short_description: DYMO LabelWriter 550 Turbo not printing labels on Windows 11
description: The user was trying to print labels. They have a DYMO LabelWriter 550 Turbo. It’s connected to Windows 11 and using DYMO Connect. But it just won’t print anything at all. They seemed frustrated and kept asking why it’s not working.
